overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city street at night, approaching and passing a large illuminated billboard reading 'I'M WITH YOU'. The scene features wet reflective pavement, industrial buildings with red warning lights, and sparse vehicle traffic. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with cinematic neon-drenched atmosphere and artificial lighting from street lamps and the massive digital display.

overgrown vegetation and trash bags along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy cyberpunk sidewalk at night, approaching a massive illuminated billboard. The industrial building on the left features red warning lights, while a street lamp illuminates the wet concrete path. Sparse traffic moves on the road to the right as the camera steadily advances toward the billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing under large billboard structure at urban intersection

events.description: walking directly under the billboard support structure, temporarily obscuring the sky
emerging from under the billboard into the open intersection area

agents.ego_description: passing under the billboard structure and entering the intersection area

notable_agents.action: figure ascending the stairs on the industrial building facade

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible beyond the billboard structure
marked pedestrian crossing area becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving close to the massive billboard, the camera passes under its support structure around the 20-second mark. The industrial building on the left reveals stairs with a pedestrian ascending. Palm trees and the intersection become visible ahead as the billboard moves behind the camera, transitioning from the enclosed billboard zone to the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with industrial complex and overpass

events.description: vehicle drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward the overpass and industrial complex

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the foggy intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal visible at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the scene opens into a wide intersection with the industrial building now prominent on the left. Palm trees line the path as the camera moves through the crosswalk area. A vehicle drives through the intersection from the right, and the overpass structure remains visible in the foggy distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a foggy cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow, billboard-dominated corridor into a wide, open city intersection. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk, advancing past an industrial building marked by red warning lights while moving steadily toward a massive, illuminated billboard. As the camera passes beneath the billboard's support structure, the view expands to reveal a pedestrian ascending stairs on the left and the first glimpses of palm trees ahead. The scene then opens fully into a broad intersection, shifting from the enclosed glow of the digital display to a wider urban vista where a vehicle crosses the path from the right. Finally, the camera moves through the crosswalk area, leaving the industrial structures behind while heading toward a distant overpass shrouded in fog.
